textByHashes.4c0624bae902c89addecb2be0f126263d61f76d5: Greetings! What can I do for you?
textByHashes.7b73d69be2025bc92fc3ac65e83fdca7f476ea7d: I'm a shipwright. I supply boats of all kinds to anyone with the money to afford them.
textByHashes.5d99d7924974d127a107d6ad3a20edae5768006c: Sorry, but I don't have any ready for sale right now. I'm sure I will soon, so keep checking back.
textByHashes.e507a738baf0f359337fa4e8c01902f3d16e989d: Of course! Which one would you like?
textByHashes.7fc042de1f76fd4a783af64f00af53902a9ad07f: Not a problem. Just let me know which boat you want to customise and I'll get things set up for you.
textByHashes.00555c21e5708a9e1b54f88f60a6696b5a3d3c2d: Certainly! Let me know which boat you want retrieving and I'll call in a port wizard to teleport it over.
textByHashes.6fffa5746d94c6588668fe955e4cd8bb6df3657d: That boat currently docked at . It'd normally cost coins for retrieval but I'll waive the cost this time since I'm in a good mood.
textByHashes.b9eeeff12c045daf8a1cd78db49cadee248138fa: That boat is lost at sea. A port wizard would normally retrieve it for you for coins but I'll waive the cost this time since I'm in a good mood.
textByHashes.e062f5405503dfcd2881b4b9ae1079e264989d54: Right, time to call in the port wizard.
textByHashes.0527c5aa695cfb9d648e294f07cc4abe3f9d74c7: All done! The boat is now docked here at .
textByHashes.04a46891e5f7a00f51cd2dfe5f2867a3deafa0f7: Fair enough. Come back if you change your mind.
textByHashes.4408796bc923e9826b8923f11094b4df18594fa1: I'm afraid I can't help you with that at the moment. You'll have to come back later.
